Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Chicago/Kilbourne
ShortDescription: EB 66 Chicago buses are temp. rerouted via Chicago, Cicero, Augusta, Kostner, Chicago and over regular route: due to, street blockage near Chicago/Kilbourne.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via Chicago, Cicero, Augusta, Kostner, Chicago and over regular route: due to, street blockage near Chicago/Kilbourne.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
